rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CHRISTOPHER S WINTER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing (although the order appointing was signed on 6/9/15, not 6/10/15, the allegation regarding Rev. & Tax C. Section 19513 was incorrect insofar as that law was repealed, the I&A filed on 5/15/18 was actually a Corrected I&A and item 4 shouldn ot have been completed as a Probate Referee was appointed, the order for preliminary distribution was signed on 10/26/16, not 10/27/16, and the administrator is the sole beneficiary but not the sole heir).
